name: Crockpot Chicken
recipeIngredient: Chicken cut into parts or 2 whole chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables in the crock pot.
2. Put the chicken on top of the vegetables.
3. Sprinkle with powdered bouillon and seasonings.
4. Add 1/4 cup water.
5. Cook on low for 8 hours. This is similar to a delicious roasted chicken.
